title: Puncher
description: Simple Fabric and Forge mod to pick up your boats and minecarts faster: Shift + LMB to break them. Custom boats / minecarts compatible!
body:
# Puncher Java
![puncher](https://github.com/shizotoaster/puncher-java/assets/51480483/0cd47333-7b2c-4ab4-b31d-c7f45aac11f7)
Simple Fabric and Forge mod to pick up your boats and minecarts faster: Shift + LMB to break them. Custom boats / minecarts compatible! Requires [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) for Fabric. [Also available for Bedrock Edition](https://modbay.org/mods/1001-puncher.html)\
\
Showcase video:\
[![](https://img.youtube.com/vi/69zw4J0mF1Y/0.jpg)](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=69zw4J0mF1Y)\
###
